world.title: Veteran playback singer S Janaki, known as Nightingale of South India, dies at 88
world.description: Veteran playback singer S Janaki, known as Nightingale of South India, died at the age of 88 in Mysore. She was the recipient of four National Film Awards and 33 different State Film Awards.
